title: No black flash on fast scroll or bookmark at deep zoom (dbg104)
description:
At high zoom, fast scrolling or bookmark jumps could leave half the page black for seconds before PDF tiles finished re-rendering.

Root cause: zoom/scroll invalidated tiles by shrinking canvases to 1×1 before async pdf.js paint completed. dbg104 keeps the last good bitmap visible until the new tile is ready, caps canvas size at 8192px to avoid browser partial-render failures, and repaints visible pages sooner on scroll.

Who is affected: OVH private server PDF Viewer fullscreen workspace.
changeLog: Keep previous PDF tile visible while re-rasterizing (no 1×1 canvas wipe).
Cap deep-zoom canvas dimensions to prevent partial black tiles.
Repaint visible pages on scroll with shorter debounce.
Queue follow-up render if zoom/scroll invalidates an in-flight tile.
